step_by_step_thinking:
The halo effect around the root on an interocclusal projection (IOPA) x-ray typically indicates increased radiolucency, which can be caused by various pathological conditions. This finding often suggests inflammation or fluid accumulation around the periapex, pointing towards periapical pathology such as periapical abscesses leading to periosteal elevation and bone resorption, consistent with periapical-periostitis.
